positive: A minimalist, high-contrast silhouette design of a stylized mountain range meeting a crescent moon and a small constellation of stars. The aesthetic is modern bohemian wanderlust, using deep indigo blues, muted terracotta oranges, and cream tones. Focus on strong, clean lines and negative space, ideal for a seamless print across apparel. The composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing dot-work (stippling) and fine line art techniques. Cinematic, dreamy, graphic novel illustration style, vector quality, flat design, high detail, ultra-definition, perfect for t-shirt printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, trademarks, celebrity, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, poorly drawn, low contrast, low detail
